market_overview.headline: Market structure shows broad weakness with major indices in bearish configurations and crypto leading the decline.
market_overview.detail: SPY and QQQ both unstacked bearish with potential bullish crosses brewing, while BTC sits in Full Bear down -17.66% vs 21W. Only 25% of stocks in Full Bull vs 28% Full Bear, signaling deteriorating breadth.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (Bullish Cross Potential)

items.name: Netflix, Inc.
items.note: Leading streaming stock showing strong rally from bear structure with imminent 8W/13W bullish cross setup.

items.name: Broadcom Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.87%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.32%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: Mega-cap semiconductor showing early reversal signs with tight EMA clustering suggesting major directional move pending.

items.name: Apple Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.27%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.77%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: Tech giant showing potential reversal setup despite bearish structure, with EMAs converging for potential bullish breakout.

items.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.75%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.99%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: Social media leader showing early reversal signals with both 8W/13W and 13W/21W crosses setting up bullishly.

items.name: NVIDIA Corporation
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.48%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just above 21W (0.62%) — bearish cross risk
items.note: AI leader showing potential bottoming action with tight EMA structure suggesting major reversal could be brewing.

items.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
items.note: Memory giant holding strong uptrend with healthy pullback to 13W providing quality entry in semiconductor recovery.

items.name: Applied Materials, Inc.
items.note: Semiconductor equipment leader showing textbook pullback structure in established uptrend with strong analyst support.

items.name: Merck & Company, Inc.
items.note: Big pharma defensive play offering solid risk-adjusted entry with consistent uptrend intact above key EMAs.

items.name: Deere & Company
items.note: Industrial leader showing healthy consolidation within uptrend, positioned for agricultural recovery theme.

momentum_themes.headline: Energy & Materials Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Energy minerals sector showing 100% bullish participation with +15.58% average gains vs 21W, while non-energy minerals and industrial services maintain strong momentum. Financial preferred shares exhibiting unusual strength.

sector_analysis.headline: Resource Sectors Outperforming, Tech & Finance Lagging

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with strong fundamental tailwinds driving sector leadership.
Mining and materials showing broad strength with inflationary hedge appeal.
Infrastructure and industrial demand driving consistent sector outperformance.

weakest.note: Massive tech selloff with 91% of names in bearish structure showing sector rotation away from growth.
Complete sector breakdown reflecting economic uncertainty and reduced business spending.
Banking sector under pressure despite some preferred share strength, reflecting rate and credit concerns.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into defensive value and resources, with traditional cyclicals showing resilience while high-multiple names face continued pressure.

items.text: BTC Full Bear structure at -46% below fair value signals continued risk-off sentiment across all asset classes
Technology services sector showing 91% bearish participation suggests growth stock selloff far from over
Major indices showing unstacked bearish EMAs with only narrow crossover opportunities preventing deeper decline
High concentration of bull breakdowns (34 names) indicates previously strong uptrends beginning to crack under pressure
